alerts.title: Temporary Closures for Highway US41 Wildfire Activity
alerts.description: Fire crews continue to monitor and patrol the US Highway 41 Fire. All closures have been lifted. Click 'more>' and scroll down for the InciWeb informational link...

alerts.title: Click the 'more' button below for additional park updates
alerts.description: Be sure to review the ALERTS & CONDITIONS page before and during your visit for additional, up-to-date information on closures, cautions, and other current park conditions.

alerts.title: Roadwork may cause delays on US 41/Tamiami Trail
alerts.description: Current roadwork is ongoing along the park's northern boundary on US Highway 41/Tamiami Trail to raise the road for Everglades Restoration benefits. Drivers may experience up to 15-minute delays and should watch for personnel, equipment and slow downs.

alerts.title: For entrance fees, we accept digital passes and credit/debit cards
alerts.description: Digital passes or credit/debit cards are the ONLY method of payment at all fee collection areas. Pre-paid digital passes are available online and may be purchased in advance.

trailheads.name: Flwl Boat Ramp Wayside Trail Head Trailhead
